name: Marushohotta Co.,Ltd.
summary: Marushohotta Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells apparels in Japan. It designs twisted yarns; mattress, feather and wool futon, and health products; decorations, jewelry, and loading and small items; and home fashion, women's clothing, baby and kids' clothes, etc. The company was founded in 1861 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Marushohotta Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of RIZAP Group Co., Ltd.
